articles.author: Thomas Jones
articles.title: Live updates, betting information for Texas basketball vs Purdue - Austin American-Statesman
articles.description: Texas basketball fell 79-77 to Purdue in the NCAA Tournament on March 26, 2026, at the SAP Center in San Jose, Calif. These were our highlights and coverage.
articles.content:
SAN JOSE, Calif.  For the first time in the NCAA Tournament, it wasn't Texas basketball making the biggest shot of the game.
Purdues Trey Kaufman-Renn converted a missed shot by Braden Smith with .6… [+23219 chars]
